heading.strategy: High impact, wide, authoritative, tight tracking for size > 32px (tracking-tight)

body.strategy: Geometric clarity, high legibility at small scales, loose leading for body text

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold

colors.strategy: Monochrome foundation (black/white/gray) with stark, singular accents (Klein Blue) to draw attention strictly to actions and active states.
colors.hover_states: Hover states must invert colors or slightly darken. Example: hover:bg-black hover:text-white. DO NOT rely on opacity changes alone.

layout_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid - Dense, functional, scanning-optimized. 1px borders for structure, no soft shadows.
layout_spacing.grid_system: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6
layout_spacing.shadows: No soft shadows. Use sharp 1px borders or hard solid drop-shadows if elevation is required.

components.buttons: Sharp edges, flat color. Primary: Black bg, White text, hover: Klein Blue (#0022FF). Ghost: Transparent bg, black text, hover:bg-gray-100
components.cards: Cardless design preferred. If bounded, use 1px subtle border (border-border), flat white background, no shadow.
components.navigation: Sticky top bar, z-50, solid white background with 1px bottom border. Clean links, no hamburger menu on desktop.
components.forms: Use Shadcn customized for sharp corners (rounded-none). Input borders 1px solid gray, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black.
components.badges: Square edges, uppercase small tracking-[0.2em] font, contrasting background.

motion_interactions.hover: Instant color swaps or fast translations (-translate-y-[1px]).

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight, geometry matches Manrope font.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure min 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text. Black on white, or white on black.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

media.strategy: Minimalistic imagery. Use stark graphic posters or minimalist architectural grids as ambient backgrounds if needed. Profile avatars should be professional and well-lit.

image_urls.description: Minimalist black metal grid for high-end structural feel (hero or section background)
Professional avatar (grayscale style matching Swiss theme)

instructions_to_main_agent: Apply Swiss High-Contrast minimalist design system: zero border-radius, stark colors, 1px structural borders.
Do NOT use soft card shadows. Everything is flat and relies on 1px borders to separate sections.
Ensure all fonts are loaded from Google Fonts (Archivo and Manrope) as per typography section.
Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons and actionable elements.
Customize Shadcn components to remove border radii and box-shadows.
Update Tailwind globals.css to ensure var(--radius) is 0 and use specified colors.
